text:
St Mary's Hospital 

Institute of Neurology 

Clinic Date: 02 October 2025 

Dr Patel  
St Mary's Hospital  
Institute of Neurology, St Mary's Hospital, London W2 1NY  

Dear Dr Patel,  

Emily Carter, DOB: 17-08-1989, Hospital No: C672154 NHS No. 4728395612  
78 Willow Lane, London, W9 3HT 

Re: Temporary access changes for the epilepsy clinic

We are writing to advise of temporary site access changes affecting the epilepsy clinic at St Mary’s due to essential building works from 14 October to 29 November 2025. During this period, the clinic will operate from the Outpatient Suite (Ground Floor, Clarence Wing), with entry via the Praed Street entrance. Lift access is available; please allow extra time for wayfinding. 

Appointment times remain unchanged unless you are contacted. Prescription collection will continue onsite at Pharmacy A (Ground Floor), and telephone/video reviews are available on request. Parking is limited; public transport is recommended. 

Given Emily Carter’s previous missed doses, we have noted their use of smartphone alarms and NFC tags for reminders; please continue these strategies during the access change period to support timely medication adherence. 

If assistance is required on arrival, please speak to Reception or call 0207 123 4567 before your appointment. 

We anticipate normal access will resume on 02 December 2025. 

Yours sincerely

check__Seizure Frequency Number.analysis: The letter concerns temporary site access changes for the epilepsy clinic and mentions medication adherence strategies due to previously missed doses. I carefully reviewed the content and found no mention of seizures, seizure occurrences, or any explicit or implicit seizure frequency. There is no statement about being seizure free or any timeframe related to seizures. Therefore, there is no seizure frequency reference in the letter.
reference: Create a reasonable NHS letter notifying patients of temporary site access changes affecting the epilepsy clinic

flaws.description: No seizure frequency referenced in gold
Row marked as not OK in raw dataset
